subject: Please advise Babyxduck
body_text:
I know this is not your responsibility, but I am trying to convince her,
that going to NYC to become a model, so she can earn money that she thinks
she needs for college, is probably not going to end up good. I wish you
would advise her against doing this, if you are indeed still her friend,
and have not cut her off completely already.

"I think I wanna move to New York in temporarily do modeling until I can
> continue my bachelors"


[image: image.png]s
body_html:
I know this is not your responsibility, but I am trying to convince her, that going to NYC to become a model, so she can earn money that she thinks she needs for college, is probably not going to end up good. I wish you would advise her against doing this, if you are indeed still her friend, and have not cut her off completely already.
